ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Off Calendar

Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Admininstrator Due To Lack Of Assets.
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-08-2011 Continued To Nov-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Admininstrator Due To Lack Of Assets.
Off Calendar Nov-08-2011 Continued To Nov-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Continued To Nov-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Sullivan for Gregory Tripousis.

The matter was continued to November 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Sullivan to file a Petition to Close Estate for lack of Assets or a Petition to Terminate the Estate with an accounting by the Attorney of the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Sep-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Geroge Sullivan and his Client Gregory Tripousis to appear on September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution or a Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The matter was continued to September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
